arts.sum: The performances of Paik and Iwata against Wrexham make it nigh-on impossible for Davies to overlook them at Rotherham. Taylor Gardner-Hickman – a 22-year-old midfielder with almost 100 Championship games under his belt – played at right-back.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City agree compensation package as defender completes transfer
arts.sum: Browne turned down the offer of a new contract at St Andrew’s @ Knighthead Park to pursue first team football elsewhere and has been snapped up by the Saddlers. Central defender Browne enjoyed a loan spell at Walsall-based Rushall Olympic last season, appearing 18 times for the Pics alongside Saddlers midfielder Ronan Maher.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City agree third huge deal this week as Tom Brady backing pays off
arts.sum: Birmingham City have extended their partnership with UNDEFEATED, agreeing a multi-year deal with the global sportswear brand. It comes after Blues announced an extension to their kit deal with Nike this week.

arts.ttl: Steve Evans makes Birmingham City points prediction and dubs them 'Galaticos of League One'
arts.sum: Rotherham United boss Steve Evans considers Birmingham City to be the 'Galacticos of League One' after their transfer spend in the summer window. As Blues prepare to descend on South Yorkshire, Evans has complimented the club's recruitment drive and considers Blues to be 'huge'.
